items.title: Yaya Toure agrees shock next job in management and set to bring in former EFL midfielder as his assistant
items.summary: MANCHESTER CITY icon Yaya Toure has agreed to become the new head coach of Slovan Bratislava. The legendary midfielder has left his post as Saudi Arabia assistant manager under Georgios Donis. items.title: Workers vote to STRIKE at 70,000-capacity World Cup stadium days before hosting first match
items.summary: ONE of the World Cup's banner venues is on strike just days before the tournament gets underway.
